title: Rick And Morty - portal gun
description: The mod for Rick's portal cannon is here. The best mod for Rick's gun. Come here and take a look at the best mod for Rick's portal cannon. Waba laba dub dub.
body:
# Portal for all
The mod adds to your minecraft the ability to craft Rick's portal cannon from the animated series "Rick and Morty".

## For Rus user
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ys3kiq5wHVg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Craft guns
I will briefly try to tell you how to get it.

1.You need to find a biome mushroom fields. Underground, from 64 to 0 height, find crystals, and get them with a non-cerite pickaxe.
![crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de58a777b3c72b43a474c2d853486afcdf59edbf.png)
putting the crystals in the potion along with the dragon's breath, you will receive a special transport liquid.
![Craft portal fields](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c3a875262f5d8f8c73975086e6d26fdd3d50f73.png)

2.You can simply craft a memory card.

![craft memory card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81bb03da26b1ebe2444901c8c54c2afeb95558fa.png)

3.Mathematical calculations, you can get from a traveling merchant, for the price of two non-cerite blocks.
![Trade on math](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5d8d0d49d0d5fd7b41d591f85e9b86690877d24.png)

4.Connect all the materials with two iron blocks.

![Craft portal_gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7df83a4247aac8b26be4fdedd8a76f49059fa4bb.png)

## How to use it?
Press "h" on your keyboard while holding the portal cannon in your hands. You will have an interface in which you can write the id of any dimension, and it doesn't matter if it's from a simple minecraft or the modifications you downloaded.
![Gui portal gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa3df2ecb84d6c46a81ca11d9cf907331a7da770.png)

## The charges at the cannon
The cannon has only 10 charges. After they run out, the cannon will become unusable. To replenish the charge, take the discharged portal cannon in your left hand (additional) and the "Quantum Transport Solution" in the main one, press the right mouse button, and wait.
